journey.name: Onboarding Full Flow
journey.description: Test the complete onboarding flow: Welcome → Privacy → Goal → Dashboard. iOS parity: OnboardingTests (17 tests)

actions.action: Verify the onboarding Welcome screen shows the "Watch My Calories" title
Verify the subtitle "Track your meals with AI-powered calorie estimation" is displayed
Verify a "Skip" button is in the top-right corner
Verify the privacy note "Your data is never stored outside this device" is displayed at the bottom
Verify a "Get Started" button is displayed at the bottom
Verify the Privacy step is displayed with an AI consent toggle
Verify a "Skip" button is still visible
Verify the Goal step is displayed with Height, Weight, Age, Gender, and Activity Level fields
Verify a "Calculate Recommended Goal" button is visible
Verify the Target Calories field now contains a numeric value
Verify the Dashboard screen is displayed with "Watch My Calories" title and bottom navigation
